Contributors.ItacPersonItem: Ciocchi del Monte,Crtistoforo Guidalotti,Patriarch of Alessandria,1484-1564

ItacWorkItem.Notes: Farnese thanks the Academy for the epistle dedicated to him, and containing many orations of distinguished authors. Farnese also mentions Claudio Aleandro and one M[onsignor?] Silvio. Gonzaga thanks the Academy for the publication dedicated to him. The Duke of Savoy mentions that his ambassador Senator Malopera has reported the Academy`s expression of esteem for the Duke. Cardinal Madruzzo mentions that Abbot Marlupino delivered to him a volume with `versi heroici dei cardinali Sadoleto and Sfondrato frutti di cotesta rara Academia Venetiana alla quale piacque [...] dedicarmeli.` Madruzzo declares to have expressed his gratitude to his friend and academician Luca Contile. D`Este has received from Valerio Faenzi a letter from the Academy and the volume dedicated to him.

Essay.EssayTitle: Lettera del Cardinal di Napoli. Roma, 8 giugno 1559
Letetra del Cardinal di Mantova. Mantova, 10 Febbraio 1559
Lettera del Duca di Savoia. Nizza, 7 gennaio 1560
Lettera del cardinal Alessandrino. Roma 13 agosto 15??

Letetra di Monsignor di Feltre. Bologna, 6 novembre 1560

ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
